chapter_title.en: The Ninety-Fifth Assembly, the Assembly of Wednesday, Twelve Nights Remain From Sha`ban, 368 AH. Dictated in the Mashhad of Imam al-Rida (s).

text: 8 - وقال الصادق (عليه السلام) لبعض أصحابه: من غضب عليك من إخوانك ثلاث مرات، فلم يقل فيك شرا، فاتخذه لنفسك صديقا (2).

en.bilal-muhammad: Al-Sadiq (as) said to one of his companions: If one of your brethren becomes angry with you three times without saying anything evil about you, then take him as a friend.
